title: Joi no shinsatsushitsu
overview: A doctor is surprised when her long-lost love is transferred to the same hospital, and even more surprised to discover that he has a wife and child. Will she be able to confess her feelings to him before her worsening heart disease claims her life?

trailers.title: 女医の診察室PV
trailers.channel_name: 新東宝【公式】チャンネル
